Tandem AI

AI-assisted valuation, built for judgment.

Start with the company profile, load source documents, verify the extracted numbers, and move through assumptions, workbook edits, and audit checks in one place.

Document intake

Upload a source PDF. Tandem AI creates the company record, parses key figures, and updates the model.

Workflow

1. Register company and document

2. Extract financial fields

3. Build workbook, assumptions, and checks

Frontend API target: http://localhost:8000

Operator checklist

Use the same sequence every time to keep the process consistent.

1. Load the source document.
2. Review extracted metrics and confidence levels.
3. Adjust assumptions only where judgment is needed.
4. Save workbook edits and export the final file.

Extracted financials

Upload a document to populate the review table.

Workbook

The workbook appears after a document has been parsed and the model has been created.

Assumptions

Assumption controls appear after the model is generated.

AI analyst

Run contextual analysis against the selected assumption.

Select an assumption and run analysis to generate contextual guidance.

Audit and checks

Validation output and activity history for the current model.

No checks yet. Upload and parse a document to populate the validation layer.

Audit trail

No audit entries yet.
